allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path src -Recurse -Directory | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\(\(Get-Location\).Path + '\\', ''\) } ; Write-Output '---FILES---' ; Get-ChildItem -Path src -Recurse -File | ForEach-Object { '{0,7}  {1}' -f $_.Length, $_.FullName.Replace\(\(Get-Location\).Path + '\\', ''\) })

PowerShell($files = @\('src\\features\\settingsUi.js','src\\features\\sendExp.js','src\\features\\sendCol\\index.js','src\\features\\sendCol\\pure.js','src\\features\\sendCol\\logic.js','src\\sync\\gist.js','src\\features\\histogram\\index.js','src\\lib\\dom.js','src\\lib\\draggableButton.js'\); foreach\($f in $files\){ if\(Test-Path $f\){ $lines = \(Get-Content $f\).Count; $size = \(Get-Item $f\).Length; "$f`: $lines lines, $size bytes" } })
PowerShell(git mv src/features/_shared src/features/shared; if \($?\) { git status --short -- src/features })
